examples: This is the guy who's smile turns your knees to jello.
The scientists had assumed that the guts were squished or squeezed or wobbled about like a bowl of jello in a moving car.

Naturally, launch dates tend to have the solidity of Jello, so don't be dropping your life savings on any wagers here with your shady friends.
